sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) body (pr. belly, like the Syr. ܓܘܳܝܐܳ Leib). Eze 1:11, 23 Eze 1:23 Dan 10:6. Gen 47:18, “nothing remains … בִּלְתּי אִם־גְּוִיָּתֵנוּ וְאַדְמָתֵנוּ but our bodies and our lands.” Neh 9:37, עַל־גְּוִיֹּתֵנוּ משְׁלִים וּבִבְהֶמְתֵּנוּ “they have dominion over our bodies and our cattle.”

(2) a dead body, corpse, both of men, 1Sa 31:10, 12 1Sa 31:12 Nah 3:3 and of beasts, Jud. 14:8 , Jdg 14:9.
